name: DischargeGuard Orchestrator
description: Orchestrates the DischargeGuard post-discharge care workflow. Routes requests to specialized agents (Monitoring, Risk Scoring, Escalation) via A2A protocol. Single entry point for all DischargeGuard operations.

skills.name: Full Check-In Pipeline
skills.description: Run the complete post-discharge check-in workflow: monitoring → risk scoring → escalation (if needed). Produces all 5T outputs.
examples: Conduct a day-3 check-in for Maria Garcia with heart failure
Run full monitoring pipeline for patient P001

skills.name: Generate Discharge Plan
skills.description: Generate a personalized discharge plan and medication reconciliation for a newly discharged patient.
examples: Generate discharge plan for patient P001 from encounter E001

skills.name: Risk Dashboard
skills.description: Show the current risk dashboard for all monitored patients.
examples: Show me the current risk dashboard
